productDisplayName: BIBA OUTLET Women Printed Off White Kurti
description: Composition Cream, red and green printed kurti made of lightweight 100% cotton, has a round neck with slit and sequin embellishments, short cap sleeves, contrast fabric at yoke with lacing embellishment, crinkled fabric on lower part of kurti no side vents and lace embellishment at hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurti is made of soft lightweight cotton which – along with the short sleeves, will keep you cool in warm weather. The bright print will lift your mood while the print and embellishments will give you an Indian ethnic air. Wear this over jeans or leggings depending on the occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
